note: Latency estimates are directional and assume HTTP/TCP overhead, no queuing, and ideal network conditions. Add 20-40% headroom for production variance.

providers.name: OpenAI GPT-4o
providers.notes: Fast TTFT; good throughput under light load.

providers.name: Anthropic Claude 3.5 Sonnet
providers.notes: Slightly higher TTFT; strong for long-context reasoning.

providers.name: Google Gemini 1.5 Pro
providers.notes: Competitive throughput; long-context TTFT scales with input.

providers.name: Groq Llama 3.1 70B
providers.notes: Very low TBT; excellent for streaming UX.

providers.name: Local RTX 4090 (Q4_K_M 70B)
providers.notes: No network RTT; TTFT limited by prompt processing.

providers.name: Local RTX 3090 (Q4_K_M 70B)
providers.notes: Slower prompt processing and decode than 4090.

providers.name: Vast.ai RTX 4090
providers.notes: Add 30-100ms network RTT depending on data center.

providers.name: RunPod RTX 4090
providers.notes: Cold-start can add seconds if not pre-warmed.

architectures.name: Single-shot agent
architectures.description: One LLM call, no retrieval or tools.

architectures.name: RAG agent
architectures.description: Retrieve context before generation; single LLM call.

architectures.name: Tool-calling agent
architectures.description: LLM generates tool calls, executes them, then generates final answer.

architectures.name: Multi-turn reasoning agent
architectures.description: Several reflection or planning turns before final output.
